ja_html: <ruby><rb>多分</rb><rt>たぶん</rt></ruby>、<ruby><rb>私</rb><rt>わたし</rt></ruby>じゃなくていいね
zh_text: 或許不是我也沒關係吧
en_text: I don't think it had to be me

zh_text: 反正已到臨界點的兩人
en_text: Both too caught up in ourselves

ja_html: <ruby><rb>気付</rb><rt>きづ</rt></ruby>けば<ruby><rb>喧嘩</rb><rt>けんか</rt></ruby>ばっかりしてさ ごめんね
zh_text: 回想起來的盡是爭執 對不起
en_text: We were fighting constantly, So sorry

ja_html: ずっと<ruby><rb>話</rb><rt>はな</rt></ruby>そうと<ruby><rb>思</rb><rt>おも</rt></ruby>ってた
zh_text: 原以為能一直無話不談
en_text: I'd been wanting to talk to you for a while

ja_html: きっと<ruby><rb>私</rb><rt>わたし</rt></ruby>たち<ruby><rb>合</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>わないね
zh_text: 一定是我們不夠契合吧
en_text: That we probably weren't a good match

ja_html: <ruby><rb>二人</rb><rt>ふたり</rt></ruby>きりしかいない<ruby><rb>部屋</rb><rt>へや</rt></ruby>でさ
zh_text: 在兩人獨處的房間裡
en_text: Only ever the two of us in the room

zh_text: 你總是唱著獨角戲吧
en_text: You always did the talking

ja_html: もしいつか<ruby><rb>何処</rb><rt>どこ</rt></ruby>かで<ruby><rb>会</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>えたら

en_text: If someday we should meet again

ja_html: <ruby><rb>今日</rb><rt>きょう</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>事</rb><rt>こと</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>笑</rb><rt>わら</rt></ruby>ってくれるかな
zh_text: 能否將今天的事一笑置之
en_text: I wonder if you could laugh about this day

ja_html: <ruby><rb>理由</rb><rt>りゆう</rt></ruby>もちゃんと<ruby><rb>話</rb><rt>はな</rt></ruby>せないけれど
zh_text: 雖然我也不會把原因告訴你
en_text: Reasons, I can't even really explain

ja_html: <ruby><rb>貴方</rb><rt>あなた</rt></ruby>が<ruby><rb>眠</rb><rt>ねむ</rt></ruby>った<ruby><rb>後</rb><rt>あと</rt></ruby>に<ruby><rb>泣</rb><rt>な</rt></ruby>くのは<ruby><rb>嫌</rb><rt>いや</rt></ruby>
zh_text: 但是我討厭在你入睡後哭泣
en_text: Just no more crying after you're asleep

ja_html: <ruby><rb>声</rb><rt>こえ</rt></ruby>も<ruby><rb>顔</rb><rt>かお</rt></ruby>も<ruby><rb>不器用</rb><rt>ぶきよう</rt></ruby>なとこも
zh_text: 你的聲音、臉龐和你的笨拙之處
en_text: Your voice, your face, even your awkwardness

ja_html: <ruby><rb>全部</rb><rt>ぜんぶ</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>全部</rb><rt>ぜんぶ</rt></ruby> <ruby><rb>嫌</rb><rt>きら</rt></ruby>いじゃないの
zh_text: 一切一切 我都不討厭
en_text: Everything, all of it, I don't hate any of it

en_text: I think, I know, I'm sure, it's got to… the colors will fade away

en_text: It probably didn't have to be you

ja_html: もう<ruby><rb>泣</rb><rt>な</rt></ruby>かされることもないし

en_text: No more thinking the words "Why always me"

ja_html: <ruby><rb>新</rb><rt>あたら</rt></ruby>しい<ruby><rb>人</rb><rt>ひと</rt></ruby>と<ruby><rb>並</rb><rt>なら</rt></ruby>ぶ<ruby><rb>君</rb><rt>きみ</rt></ruby>は

en_text: With that new person next to you

ja_html: ちゃんとうまくやれているのかな

en_text: Your voice, your face, even your awkwardness
